_README: Public roadmap for the SpaceCraft Planner. The dev curates this file — community requests arrive by email and only appear here once added, so nothing user-typed is auto-published. status: planned | in-progress | considering | done.

items.title: Professional 'Command Console' redesign
items.note: Refined palette, typography, hairline UI, hover-only glow.

items.title: Public roadmap + feature request form
items.note: This page — submit ideas and track what's coming.

items.title: Factory automation planner
items.note: Target item + rate/hour → building counts, raw rates, power, factory map.

items.title: Data-integrity & input-validation pass
items.note: Escaping, price validation, safe local saves, no jarring reloads.

items.title: Shareable factory plan links
items.note: Copy a link that reopens your exact factory build.

items.title: 'Where to mine' links from raw materials
items.note: Jump from any raw input to the sectors/deposits that yield it.

items.title: Side-by-side item comparison
items.note: Compare two production chains at once.

items.title: Copy factory build list to clipboard
items.note: Paste a clean build summary into Discord.

items.title: Loading skeletons instead of text spinner
items.note: Layout appears instantly on slow connections.

items.title: Ctrl+K / '/' quick item search
items.note: Jump to any item from anywhere.

items.title: Favorites / pinned items
items.note: Star items for a quick-access dashboard.

items.title: Mining Bureau progression ladder
items.note: What unlocks to mine at each bureau level.
